reviews.comment:
el lugar hermoso buena atencion en surtidores .y cafeteria .en el local q esta la parrilla .muy mala atencion los condimentos .como el aceite para las ensaladas con moscas adentro y rancio con moho .

(Translated by Google)
The place is beautiful, good service at the pumps and cafeteria. However, the service at the grill is very bad, and the condiments, like the salad oil, had flies in it and was rancid with mold.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTbDVyVC1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Espacio amplio con mesitas para descansar en el viaje. Sin embargo, suele haber mucha gente comprando y hay que esperar y, además, si se viaja solo con mascotas, ni vayan: no podés entrar al baño ni al mercadito.

(Translated by Google)
Large space with tables to rest on the trip. However, there are usually a lot of people shopping and you have to wait and, furthermore, if you are traveling alone with pets, don't even go: you can't go into the bathroom or the market.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcHBPdUVREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion, lo mejor esta saliendo de la estacion, rumbo a bs as, el puesto de salamines quesos y pan casero, la señora es una genia y mejor persona. Siemore comoro para picada, muy buena mercaderia casera

(Translated by Google)
Great service, the best place is right outside the station, heading towards Buenos Aires. The stand selling salami, cheese, and homemade bread is fantastic. The lady is wonderful and an even better person. I always buy there for snacks; the homemade products are excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcDd1NlFBEAE
